where.if: AND (1=0 OR l.widget_nm ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' OR l.widget_code ILIKE '%' || #{searchValue} || '%' )

if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != '' and dateType != null and dateType != ''

choose.when: AND l.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND l.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')
AND l.upd_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND l.upd_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.dp :: DpWidgetLib :: selectById */ l.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_wt.code_label AS widget_type_cd_nm FROM dp_widget_lib l LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = l.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_wt ON cd_wt.code_grp = 'WIDGET_TYPE' AND cd_wt.code_value = l.widget_type_cd WHERE l.widget_lib_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.dp :: DpWidgetLib :: selectList */ l.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_wt.code_label AS widget_type_cd_nm FROM dp_widget_lib l LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = l.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_wt ON cd_wt.code_grp = 'WIDGET_TYPE' AND cd_wt.code_value = l.widget_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.dp :: DpWidgetLib :: selectPageList */ l.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_wt.code_label AS widget_type_cd_nm FROM dp_widget_lib l LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = l.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_wt ON cd_wt.code_grp = 'WIDGET_TYPE' AND cd_wt.code_value = l.widget_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(l.*) /* base.ec.dp :: DpWidgetLib :: selectPageCount */ FROM dp_widget_lib l
